config.cluster: unique task_id; pooled task clusters retain all five models, both generation conditions, and paired B0/B3 rows
config.bootstrap: family-stratified unique-task percentile bootstrap; unstratified unique-task interval also reported
config.paired_unit: run (gate mode varies within a run; G0+G1 pooled)
config.core_outcome: accepted.risky_accepted_patch restricted to task families F1-F3 (RiskyAcc-Core)

Qwen-7B.bootstrap_method: family-stratified percentile bootstrap over unique task_id clusters; a sampled task carries all model/condition/mode rows

Qwen-14B.bootstrap_method: family-stratified percentile bootstrap over unique task_id clusters; a sampled task carries all model/condition/mode rows

Qwen-32B.bootstrap_method: family-stratified percentile bootstrap over unique task_id clusters; a sampled task carries all model/condition/mode rows

DeepSeek-6.7B.bootstrap_method: family-stratified percentile bootstrap over unique task_id clusters; a sampled task carries all model/condition/mode rows

CodeLlama-7B.bootstrap_method: family-stratified percentile bootstrap over unique task_id clusters; a sampled task carries all model/condition/mode rows

Pooled.bootstrap_method: family-stratified percentile bootstrap over unique task_id clusters; a sampled task carries all model/condition/mode rows

clustered_logistic.method_used: GEE logistic (Binomial family, exchangeable working correlation, groups=shared task_id); marginal B3-vs-B0 effect over the fixed five-model, two-generation-condition evaluation panel
clustered_logistic.convergence_notes: GEE converged (cov_struct=Exchangeable); robust sandwich SEs over unique task_id clusters. OR is B3 vs B0 (B0 = reference); OR << 1 means B3 sharply reduces the odds of an accepted-but-risky patch. Consistent in direction and magnitude with the paired McNemar / Haldane OR result reported in the manuscript.

clustered_logistic_core.method_used: GEE logistic (Binomial family, exchangeable working correlation, groups=shared task_id); marginal B3-vs-B0 effect over the fixed five-model, two-generation-condition evaluation panel
clustered_logistic_core.convergence_notes: GEE converged (cov_struct=Exchangeable); robust sandwich SEs over unique task_id clusters. OR is B3 vs B0 (B0 = reference); OR << 1 means B3 sharply reduces the odds of an accepted-but-risky patch. Consistent in direction and magnitude with the paired McNemar / Haldane OR result reported in the manuscript.
